afterMs.description: Test-clock offset (ms from flow start) at which the signal is delivered.

stepId.description: The `human-task` step id this signal targets.

action.description: What the signal does: `resolve` (default), or `pause`/`resume` the pausable SLA clock (§5.7).

value.description: The resolution value written to the step's `out` variable (required for `resolve`; ignored for pause/resume).

description: A scripted signal a conformance vector delivers to a `human-task` step (correlated by `stepId`, doc 04 §5.2/§5.7).
